title: More Sweet Treats! - Food Expansion
description: Add a burst of sugar to your world with More Sweet Treats! Packed with candies, cakes, and delicious desserts, this addon brings fun, flavorful food to Minecraft. Perfect for builders, roleplayers, and anyone with a sweet tooth
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/511bb13f9bed0fd8ad2aeb26d018b562e0083987.png)
![Fabric](https://voxelforge-oss.github.io/voxicons/voxicons/icons-64/brands/fabric.png) ![NeoForge](https://voxelforge-oss.github.io/voxicons/voxicons/icons-64/brands/neoforge.png) ![Forge](https://voxelforge-oss.github.io/voxicons/voxicons/icons-64/brands/forge.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_P7WLkzMm0c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

More Sweet Treats adds a delicious variety of desserts, candies, and sugary delights to your Minecraft world!

From baked goods like muffins and pies to colorful candies and caramel treats, this mod is perfect for players who want more food variety and a fun, cozy vibe. Whether you're decorating a bakery, building a café, or just love collecting unique foods, there’s something here for every sweet tooth.

---

# New Foods

## Candy

More Sweet Treats adds 8 unique candies, each bringing a burst of color and sweetness to your Minecraft world.

| Glow Berry Gummy                                                                        | Lollipop                                                                      | Caramel Candy                                                                           |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
|  ![Glow Berry Gummy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7997fded75c1eb2f91cb7d7f0cd2fce78d40d990.png) | ![Lollipop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0da738eaaf26eab422bb0fff98796fe5ae1f8c47.png) | ![Caramel Candy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dff756ee6c48345c6864513e3cb050989dfabcaf.png) |

| Turkish Delight                                                                               | Berry Candy                                                                         | Candy Apple                                                                         |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| ![Turkish Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/057af4cf422eeb85f2ac49491f7227691b2d6522.png) | ![Berry Candy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa258ebc4b6e11606475d8c90966de9620bfa66f.png) | ![Candy Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7312accefa6855058f7d1e81207fc3e8d90938ea.png) |

| Melon Candy                                                                         | Chocolate Bar                                                                       |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| ![Melon Candy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7603cf6dfb949394d01be261ea4a3d15968d0d3.png) | ![Chocolate Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68a84feda1b301a6194ce445df00148b2e6ecc85.png) |

_Glow Berry Gummies grant a brief Night Vision effect._

---

## Cakes and Cookies

More Sweet Treats introduces 6 freshly baked cakes and cookies, perfect for decorating a bakery or a quick snack.

| Beetroot Brownie                                                                              | Honey Cake                                                                        | Caramel Slice                                                                           |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| ![Beetroot Brownie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b54f34490ce5e75eac583c6da9dc21f73524e10.png) | ![Honey Cake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec2d73459c67d07464d1df82210c9e00fa7a1e82.png) | ![Caramel Slice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eebb99d768487f92fe569d87ca7f52f4cd576b60.png) |

| Chocolate Muffin                                                                         | Choc Honeycomb Cookie                                                                            | Apple Pie                                                                       |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| ![Choc muffin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8294e663420cb2f437e40137f8ef017b24b494dd.png) | ![Honey cookie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e089ff0ac38b71b4eee5cf2586f9d4201ba5e1c6.png) | ![Apple Pie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d25ad9efbc62d342c318260c74f33ddf044b27b.png) |

---

## Drinks and Ice Cream

More Sweet Treats introduces 3 refreshing drinks and creamy ice cream treats to your world.

| Chocolate Milkshake                                                                       | Melon Smoothie                                                                       | Chocolate Ice Cream                                                                                |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| ![Milkshake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84179688a9435dfd86d77c6e82b2f187856d7192.png) | ![Smoothie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edc099b29f420572303f2c177278bd5f380eba0d.png) | ![icecream](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/344a1adc7b8a12a26803b8b27735551f89a0b651.png) |

_Chocolate Ice Cream grants a brief Fire Resistance effect._

---

## Ingredients

Sugar can be smelted in a furnace to create caramel, which is a key ingredient for many of the recipes above.


![Caramel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4f111917fa07023733c6df730e15a7c2f5a3999.gif)

---

# ![sugar rush](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e21a3ee80b1e25b5fcef282578a4688c74ebc534.png) Sugar Rush & Crash!

Consuming Sweet Treats in quick succession will trigger a **Sugar Rush**, briefly granting a substantial speed boost.

However, once the rush wears off, you’ll be hit with **Slowness** and **Hunger**.

If you trigger Sugar Rush too frequently, you’ll instead suffer a **Sugar Crash**, leaving you feeling sick.
